name: Mexican Style Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the beef ribs.
2. Pour off excess fat.
3. Mix the beef consomme with the dry taco seasoning mix and green pepper.
4. Place the sauce over the ribs in a crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 6 - 8 hours.
Note: Follow the instructions in "Poke Along Crock Pot Cook Book" by Jean Hores, posted by Sam Waring at rec.food.recipes or rec.food.cooking.
